TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Maraoday to ko 26 miheca no Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a analal == Toya miheca misa'osi to Taywan likisi marepet no Tiawcaci a romi'ad. ( 2017-05-09 21:30) Itiya i 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad toya dafak, Tiawcaci micokeray a kakeridan ci Gao Minghui ko citodongay miocor to dademakay micomod i Tsinghua daykako, mirepet to Tsinghua daykako mikiwkiway mityiliday ci Liao Weicheng; toya a romi'ad, Taywan daykako Syakay kinkiwsi misawaday matayalay ci Chen Zhengran, mikihatiyaay to syakay onto ci Wang Xiuhui ato Tintosi ci Masao Nikar (Lin Yinfo) marepet to; ikor no saka tosa romi'ad, marepet haca pacipatay to kami ci Druluan Cegau (An Zhengguang), saka lalimaay ko marepetay a tamdaw. Pasowal sa koya Tiawcacan, o pilepet i cangraan i, nawhani o micadaay to padafoh no itiraay i Dipong Misatatad to Taywan a tamdaw ci Shi Mingan, o aitini i Taywan mipacomahad to Misatatad to Taywan a yofayof sakapot. Nika so'elinay, oya 5 marepetay a tamdaw caay ho pidemak to katalawan a demak, oya pisa'osi aca to nitilidan ni Shi Ming a tilid to "Taywan tamdaw 400 miheca a likisi", o natayraay to i Dipong miliso' ci Shi Mingan, minokay tayni Taywan i opipadang mirina ato pakilac to sapisintin. Nika o Tiawcaci a matayalay tamdaw caay ka fana' to no pitilidan a demak, micomod i Koli Tsinghua Daykako mirepet ci Liao Weichengan, oni marepatay tamdaw o nano pikihatiya mirawraway to laloma' "Cence Panloanloan sarikec" ato "Singfa" 100 liyad a laloma'ay mirawraw a raraw, o papatayen ko ka ciraraw, caay ko mamangay konini a demak, caay ka dengan o Tsinghua Daykako a mitiliday ko miliyangay, polong no Taywan a kasaDaykako ato cifenekay tamdaw tomireng midemak miliyang to matiniay demak, paratatenga ko ko Tiawcaci a pirepet to tamdaw, tadamaan ko picalap to Kimpo saka pakonira a sowal, nanoya, o sakisician a piliyang mararid a caay pitolas, o sakapalowad marikec to ponkaan a matanengay mapatireng to sapipalasawad to Singfa 100 liyad salongao "100 demak lekapot". Saikoray, ma'awid no syakay ko citodongay, oya marepetay a tamdaw ikor mapalasawad to ko kacirarawan, nanoya, o Lifayin nanoya sa mipalasawad to "Conghua minko Singfa" 100 liyad ato "Cence panloan tiawli". Sa'ayaw pirepet no Tiawcaci ci Liao Weicheng a demak, sakalamkam sa ko malasingsiay ato mitiliday no Tsinghua Daykako. Itiya 9 romi'ad kalahokan, o mitiliday no Tsinghua maro', papelo ato pacipat to paya, patireng ko mitiliday "Liao Weicheng micokeray" itira i pitilidan mirarakat, o kasacefang no mitiliday itira i sacomod no pitilidan miteleng to "Miliyang to picomod no milinikay tayal i pitilidan" sanay a sapiliyang a calay, herek no lahok, Tsinghua daykako malalinah tayra i Simponce, Lifayin, Taypisi Tiacaci miliyang. I 5 folad 10 romi'ad, mayakyak to konini a demak. Polong no kasaDaykako macowat i pitilidan mipadangay onto, Cense, Taywan hakasi yofayof, Congyang kinkiwyin a kasa mikinkiwan sakapot, mitelak "Mifelih to hitayan picalap to sifo a sakapot" a todong, malekapot to ponkakay tamdaw mapolong miliyang. I 5 folad 12 romi'ad, "Polong finawlan mifelihay to pisamsam no sician a sakapot" a mitiliday, nanoya micomod tayra i Congcen piharatengan, ira ko mataelifay to 10 tamdaw mikihatiya. Saan, miki'ayaw milaplap ko imeng to fanawlan, pakaka ko piliyang no mitiliday. Saka tosa romi'ad, mihapiw ko mitiliday no Tsinghua Daykako to sapi "Paterep mitilid", ira ko 28 Tsinghua Daykako mikihatiya to "Pakoniraay pinanam, awaay ko raraw no harateng" paterep a onto. Nanoya, o lalowadan to no kasaDaykako miliyang mitilid. I 5 folad 13 romi'ad, o sapipaterepaw to kararawraw no mitiliday i Daykako, micokeray to kakeridan (Cicang) ci Gao Minghui miliyas to kala micokeray to Cecang, nika caay to katakop konini a mifelihay to sifo a fanawlan no Taywan. Caay ka dengan o Taywan Daykako Holic kakoyin ko mipalowaday to sakaeca pitilid, ato kalodemakan, i 5 folad 15 romi'ad, Tsinghua Daykako "Liao Weicheng micokeray" 300 ko tamdaw no mitiliday ato hakasi ato "Polong no kitakit Daykako lekapot" a mitiliday 700, 800 ko tamdaw, syakay kasakapot, i herek no lahok micalap to siyataw no kasoling i Taypi, pasimirarakatay to kamatini no demak to "Palasawad to mirawraway tatiihay a rikec, milongoc pasadaken ko masemsemay, mifelih to pikari'ang no sifo, mingado to pakoniraay sapikingkiw" a 4 sasowalen. Ikor i, o mitiliday, hakasi salongan 2000 ko milafinay itira siyataw no Taypi kasoling, milongoc to KMT sifo palasawaden ko Cence Panlowan rikec. O piliyan no mitiliday i siyataw ira ko 5 romi'adan, tangasa i 5 folad 20 romi'ad a paherek. I 5 folad 16 romi'ad, Lifayin makalah pasadak to sapipalasawad to Cence Panlowan rikec a pa'eses. I 5 folad 17 romi'ad, Lifayin kinatolo mihayda palasawad to dengan pipatay a Cence Panlowan rikec. Nanoya, Tiawcace pasadaken ci Chen Zhengran, Wang Xiuhui, Masao Nikar (Lin Yinfu), Liao Weicheng sasepat a masadak. I 5 folad 20 romi'ad, oya "Fenekay mifelihay to sifo misemsem a nikapolongan" mikerid to "520" piliyang a demak, pakiharateng sasowalen a mapakonira a patosokan, nai mafenekay, mitiliday onto ato syakay onto mapolong palowad t ofinawlan no Taywan "Mifelih kohecalay katalawan ato sici pisemsem" a ta'angay pirakarak, o mitiliday itira ka'ayaw no Ciencayin a milafin, Congsan nanlo, milongoc to KMT sifo "Hao Baicun katefad", "Palasawad to Cence Panlowan rikec", "Misimeday masakak to pitilidan", ato "Awaay ko raraw pasadaken ko Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a marofoay" sanay. I 5 folad 22 romi'ad, Congtong ci Lee Teng-hui micering to palasawad to "Cence Panlowan rikec". Tangasa 1992 miheca 5 folad a "Satefoc 100 liyad" mapalasawad to, itiya so'elin no KMT to sapilepataw to "Mifelihay a kaciraraw" a pakayraan.
S.PHON: == marao~uɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~u ** miħəʦa no~u misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ == to~uja miħəʦa misaʡo~usi to~u tajwan ɾikisi marəpət no~u tiawʦaʦi a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. ( ****-**-** **:**) itija i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~uja ɬ~ɮafak, tiawʦaʦi miʦo~ukəraj a kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj mio~uʦo~ur to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u, mirəpət to~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u mikiwkiwaj mitjiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ; to~uja a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u sjakaj kinkiwsi misawaɬ~ɮaj matajaɾaj ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋran, mikiħatijaaj to~u sjakaj o~unto~u ʦi waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui ato~u tinto~usi ʦi masao~u nikar (ɾin jinfo~u) marəpət to~u; iko~ur no~u saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, marəpət ħaʦa paʦipataj to~u kami ʦi ɬ~ɮro~u~uɾo~u~uan ʦə*ao~u~u (an *ħəŋ*o~u~uaŋ), saka ɾaɾimaaj ko~u marəpətaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. paso~uwaɾ sa ko~uja tiawʦaʦan, o~u piɾəpət i ʦaŋraan i, nawħani o~u miʦaɬ~ɮaaj to~u paɬ~ɮafo~uħ no~u itiraaj i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi sħi miŋan, o~u aitini i tajwan mipaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ to~u misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan a jo~ufajo~uf sakapo~ut. nika so~uʡəɾinaj, o~uja * marəpətaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaaj ħo~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u kataɾawan a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~uja pisaʡo~usi aʦa to~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan ni sħi miŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u "tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw *** miħəʦa a ɾikisi", o~u natajraaj to~u i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miɾiso~uʡ ʦi sħi miŋan, mino~ukaj tajni tajwan i o~upipaɬ~ɮaŋ mirina ato~u pakiɾaʦ to~u sapisintin. nika o~u tiawʦaʦi a matajaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaaj ka fanaʡ to~u no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮəmak, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ko~uɾi tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u mirəpət ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋan, o~uni marəpataj tamɬ~ɮaw o~u nano~u pikiħatija mirawrawaj to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡ "ʦənʦə panɾo~uanɾo~uan sarikəʦ" ato~u "siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a ɾaɾo~umaʡaj mirawraw a raraw, o~u papatajən ko~u ka ʦiraraw, ʦaaj ko~u mamaŋaj ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ko~u miɾijaŋaj, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajwan a kasaɬ~ɮajkako~u ato~u ʦifənəkaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~umirəŋ miɬ~ɮəmak miɾijaŋ to~u matiniaj ɬ~ɮəmak, paratatəŋa ko~u ko~u tiawʦaʦi a pirəpət to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u piʦaɾap to~u kimpo~u saka pako~unira a so~uwaɾ, nano~uja, o~u sakisiʦian a piɾijaŋ marariɬ~ɮ a ʦaaj pito~uɾas, o~u sakapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ marikəʦ to~u po~unkaan a matanəŋaj mapatirəŋ to~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u siŋfa *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ saɾo~uŋao~u "*** ɬ~ɮəmak ɾəkapo~ut". saiko~uraj, maʡawiɬ~ɮ no~u sjakaj ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, o~uja marəpətaj a tamɬ~ɮaw iko~ur mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u kaʦirarawan, nano~uja, o~u ɾifajin nano~uja sa mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua minko~u siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ ato~u "ʦənʦə panɾo~uan tiawɾi". saʡajaw pirəpət no~u tiawʦaʦi ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, sakaɾamkam sa ko~u maɾasiŋsiaj ato~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u. itija * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ kaɾaħo~ukan, o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u tsiŋħo~u~ua maro~uʡ, papəɾo~u ato~u paʦipat to~u paja, patirəŋ ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj "ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ miʦo~ukəraj" itira i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mirarakat, o~u kasaʦəfaŋ no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj itira i saʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mitəɾəŋ to~u "miɾijaŋ to~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u miɾinikaj tajaɾ i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan" sanaj a sapiɾijaŋ a ʦaɾaj, ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk, tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u maɾaɾinaħ tajra i simpo~unʦə, ɾifajin, tajpisi tiaʦaʦi miɾijaŋ. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, majakjak to~u ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak. po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kasaɬ~ɮajkako~u maʦo~uwat i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj o~unto~u, ʦənsə, tajwan ħakasi jo~ufajo~uf, ʦo~uŋjaŋ kinkiwjin a kasa mikinkiwan sakapo~ut, mitəɾak "mifəɾiħ to~u ħitajan piʦaɾap to~u sifo~u a sakapo~ut" a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, maɾəkapo~ut to~u po~unkakaj tamɬ~ɮaw mapo~uɾo~uŋ miɾijaŋ. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, "po~uɾo~uŋ finawɾan mifəɾiħaj to~u pisamsam no~u siʦian a sakapo~ut" a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, nano~uja miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ tajra i ʦo~uŋʦən piħaratəŋan, ira ko~u mataəɾifaj to~u ** tamɬ~ɮaw mikiħatija. saan, mikiʡajaw miɾapɾap ko~u iməŋ to~u fanawɾan, pakaka ko~u piɾijaŋ no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj. saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miħapiw ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u to~u sapi "patərəp mitiɾiɬ~ɮ", ira ko~u ** tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u mikiħatija to~u "pako~uniraaj pinanam, awaaj ko~u raraw no~u ħaratəŋ" patərəp a o~unto~u. nano~uja, o~u ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan to~u no~u kasaɬ~ɮajkako~u miɾijaŋ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u sapipatərəpaw to~u kararawraw no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i ɬ~ɮajkako~u, miʦo~ukəraj to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan (ʦiʦaŋ) ʦi *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui miɾijas to~u kaɾa miʦo~ukəraj to~u ʦəʦaŋ, nika ʦaaj to~u katako~up ko~unini a mifəɾiħaj to~u sifo~u a fanawɾan no~u tajwan. ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u ħo~uɾiʦ kako~ujin ko~u mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj to~u sakaəʦa pitiɾiɬ~ɮ, ato~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮəmakan, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u "ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ miʦo~ukəraj" *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ato~u ħakasi ato~u "po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit ɬ~ɮajkako~u ɾəkapo~ut" a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ***, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, sjakaj kasakapo~ut, i ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk miʦaɾap to~u sijataw no~u kaso~uɾiŋ i tajpi, pasimirarakataj to~u kamatini no~u ɬ~ɮəmak to~u "paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u mirawrawaj tatiiħaj a rikəʦ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ pasaɬ~ɮakən ko~u masəmsəmaj, mifəɾiħ to~u pikariʡaŋ no~u sifo~u, miŋaɬ~ɮo~u to~u pako~uniraaj sapikiŋkiw" a * saso~uwaɾən. iko~ur i, o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, ħakasi saɾo~uŋan **** ko~u miɾafinaj itira sijataw no~u tajpi kaso~uɾiŋ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u kmt sifo~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮən ko~u ʦənʦə panɾo~uwan rikəʦ. o~u piɾijan no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i sijataw ira ko~u * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, taŋasa i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a paħərək. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾifajin makaɾaħ pasaɬ~ɮak to~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦənʦə panɾo~uwan rikəʦ a paʡəsəs. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾifajin kinato~uɾo~u miħajɬ~ɮa paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮəŋan pipataj a ʦənʦə panɾo~uwan rikəʦ. nano~uja, tiawʦaʦə pasaɬ~ɮakən ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋran, waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui, masao~u nikar (ɾin jinfo~u~u), ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ sasəpat a masaɬ~ɮak. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uja "fənəkaj mifəɾiħaj to~u sifo~u misəmsəm a nikapo~uɾo~uŋan" mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u "***" piɾijaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, pakiħaratəŋ saso~uwaɾən a mapako~unira a pato~uso~ukan, nai mafənəkaj, mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj o~unto~u ato~u sjakaj o~unto~u mapo~uɾo~uŋ paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ t o~ufinawɾan no~u tajwan "mifəɾiħ ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan ato~u siʦi pisəmsəm" a taʡaŋaj pirakarak, o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj itira kaʡajaw no~u ʦiənʦajin a miɾafin, ʦo~uŋsan nanɾo~u, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u kmt sifo~u "ħao~u b~b~vaiʦo~u~un katəfaɬ~ɮ", "paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦənʦə panɾo~uwan rikəʦ", "misiməɬ~ɮaj masakak to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan", ato~u "awaaj ko~u raraw pasaɬ~ɮakən ko~u misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a maro~ufo~uaj" sanaj. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ɾəə təŋ-ħo~u~ui miʦəriŋ to~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʦənʦə panɾo~uwan rikəʦ". taŋasa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a "satəfo~uʦ *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ" mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u, itija so~uʡəɾin no~u kmt to~u sapiɾəpataw to~u "mifəɾiħaj a kaʦiraraw" a pakajraan.
S.FORM: == Maraoday to ko 26 miheca no Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a analal == Toya miheca misa'osi to Taywan likisi marepet no Tiawcaci a romi'ad. ( 2017-05-09 21:30) Itiya i 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad toya dafak, Tiawcaci micokeray a kakeridan ci Gao Minghui ko citodongay miocor to dademakay micomod i Tsinghua daykako, mirepet to Tsinghua daykako mikiwkiway mityiliday ci Liao Weicheng; toya a romi'ad, Taywan daykako Syakay kinkiwsi misawaday matayalay ci Chen Zhengran, mikihatiyaay to syakay onto ci Wang Xiuhui ato Tintosi ci Masao Nikar (Lin Yinfo) marepet to; ikor no saka tosa romi'ad, marepet haca pacipatay to kami ci Druluan Cegau (An Zhengguang), saka lalimaay ko marepetay a tamdaw. Pasowal sa koya Tiawcacan, o pilepet i cangraan i, nawhani o micadaay to padafoh no itiraay i Dipong Misatatad to Taywan a tamdaw ci Shi Mingan, o aitini i Taywan mipacomahad to Misatatad to Taywan a yofayof sakapot. Nika so'elinay, oya 5 marepetay a tamdaw caay ho pidemak to katalawan a demak, oya pisa'osi aca to nitilidan ni Shi Ming a tilid to "Taywan tamdaw 400 miheca a likisi", o natayraay to i Dipong miliso' ci Shi Mingan, minokay tayni Taywan i opipadang mirina ato pakilac to sapisintin. Nika o Tiawcaci a matayalay tamdaw caay ka fana' to no pitilidan a demak, micomod i Koli Tsinghua Daykako mirepet ci Liao Weichengan, oni marepatay tamdaw o nano pikihatiya mirawraway to laloma' "Cence Panloanloan sarikec" ato "Singfa" 100 liyad a laloma'ay mirawraw a raraw, o papatayen ko ka ciraraw, caay ko mamangay konini a demak, caay ka dengan o Tsinghua Daykako a mitiliday ko miliyangay, polong no Taywan a kasaDaykako ato cifenekay tamdaw tomireng midemak miliyang to matiniay demak, paratatenga ko ko Tiawcaci a pirepet to tamdaw, tadamaan ko picalap to Kimpo saka pakonira a sowal, nanoya, o sakisician a piliyang mararid a caay pitolas, o sakapalowad marikec to ponkaan a matanengay mapatireng to sapipalasawad to Singfa 100 liyad salongao "100 demak lekapot". Saikoray, ma'awid no syakay ko citodongay, oya marepetay a tamdaw ikor mapalasawad to ko kacirarawan, nanoya, o Lifayin nanoya sa mipalasawad to "Conghua minko Singfa" 100 liyad ato "Cence panloan tiawli". Sa'ayaw pirepet no Tiawcaci ci Liao Weicheng a demak, sakalamkam sa ko malasingsiay ato mitiliday no Tsinghua Daykako. Itiya 9 romi'ad kalahokan, o mitiliday no Tsinghua maro', papelo ato pacipat to paya, patireng ko mitiliday "Liao Weicheng micokeray" itira i pitilidan mirarakat, o kasacefang no mitiliday itira i sacomod no pitilidan miteleng to "Miliyang to picomod no milinikay tayal i pitilidan" sanay a sapiliyang a calay, herek no lahok, Tsinghua daykako malalinah tayra i Simponce, Lifayin, Taypisi Tiacaci miliyang. I 5 folad 10 romi'ad, mayakyak to konini a demak. Polong no kasaDaykako macowat i pitilidan mipadangay onto, Cense, Taywan hakasi yofayof, Congyang kinkiwyin a kasa mikinkiwan sakapot, mitelak "Mifelih to hitayan picalap to sifo a sakapot" a todong, malekapot to ponkakay tamdaw mapolong miliyang. I 5 folad 12 romi'ad, "Polong finawlan mifelihay to pisamsam no sician a sakapot" a mitiliday, nanoya micomod tayra i Congcen piharatengan, ira ko mataelifay to 10 tamdaw mikihatiya. Saan, miki'ayaw milaplap ko imeng to fanawlan, pakaka ko piliyang no mitiliday. Saka tosa romi'ad, mihapiw ko mitiliday no Tsinghua Daykako to sapi "Paterep mitilid", ira ko 28 Tsinghua Daykako mikihatiya to "Pakoniraay pinanam, awaay ko raraw no harateng" paterep a onto. Nanoya, o lalowadan to no kasaDaykako miliyang mitilid. I 5 folad 13 romi'ad, o sapipaterepaw to kararawraw no mitiliday i Daykako, micokeray to kakeridan (Cicang) ci Gao Minghui miliyas to kala micokeray to Cecang, nika caay to katakop konini a mifelihay to sifo a fanawlan no Taywan. Caay ka dengan o Taywan Daykako Holic kakoyin ko mipalowaday to sakaeca pitilid, ato kalodemakan, i 5 folad 15 romi'ad, Tsinghua Daykako "Liao Weicheng micokeray" 300 ko tamdaw no mitiliday ato hakasi ato "Polong no kitakit Daykako lekapot" a mitiliday 700, 800 ko tamdaw, syakay kasakapot, i herek no lahok micalap to siyataw no kasoling i Taypi, pasimirarakatay to kamatini no demak to "Palasawad to mirawraway tatiihay a rikec, milongoc pasadaken ko masemsemay, mifelih to pikari'ang no sifo, mingado to pakoniraay sapikingkiw" a 4 sasowalen. Ikor i, o mitiliday, hakasi salongan 2000 ko milafinay itira siyataw no Taypi kasoling, milongoc to KMT sifo palasawaden ko Cence Panlowan rikec. O piliyan no mitiliday i siyataw ira ko 5 romi'adan, tangasa i 5 folad 20 romi'ad a paherek. I 5 folad 16 romi'ad, Lifayin makalah pasadak to sapipalasawad to Cence Panlowan rikec a pa'eses. I 5 folad 17 romi'ad, Lifayin kinatolo mihayda palasawad to dengan pipatay a Cence Panlowan rikec. Nanoya, Tiawcace pasadaken ci Chen Zhengran, Wang Xiuhui, Masao Nikar (Lin Yinfu), Liao Weicheng sasepat a masadak. I 5 folad 20 romi'ad, oya "Fenekay mifelihay to sifo misemsem a nikapolongan" mikerid to "520" piliyang a demak, pakiharateng sasowalen a mapakonira a patosokan, nai mafenekay, mitiliday onto ato syakay onto mapolong palowad t ofinawlan no Taywan "Mifelih kohecalay katalawan ato sici pisemsem" a ta'angay pirakarak, o mitiliday itira ka'ayaw no Ciencayin a milafin, Congsan nanlo, milongoc to KMT sifo "Hao Baicun katefad", "Palasawad to Cence Panlowan rikec", "Misimeday masakak to pitilidan", ato "Awaay ko raraw pasadaken ko Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a marofoay" sanay. I 5 folad 22 romi'ad, Congtong ci Lee Teng-hui micering to palasawad to "Cence Panlowan rikec". Tangasa 1992 miheca 5 folad a "Satefoc 100 liyad" mapalasawad to, itiya so'elin no KMT to sapilepataw to "Mifelihay a kaciraraw" a pakayraan.
S.PHON: == marao~uɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~u ** miħəʦa no~u misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ == to~uja miħəʦa misaʡo~usi to~u tajwan ɾikisi marəpət no~u tiawʦaʦi a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. ( ****-**-** **:**) itija i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~uja ɬ~ɮafak, tiawʦaʦi miʦo~ukəraj a kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj mio~uʦo~ur to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u, mirəpət to~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u mikiwkiwaj mitjiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ; to~uja a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u sjakaj kinkiwsi misawaɬ~ɮaj matajaɾaj ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋran, mikiħatijaaj to~u sjakaj o~unto~u ʦi waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui ato~u tinto~usi ʦi masao~u nikar (ɾin jinfo~u) marəpət to~u; iko~ur no~u saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, marəpət ħaʦa paʦipataj to~u kami ʦi ɬ~ɮro~u~uɾo~u~uan ʦə*ao~u~u (an *ħəŋ*o~u~uaŋ), saka ɾaɾimaaj ko~u marəpətaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. paso~uwaɾ sa ko~uja tiawʦaʦan, o~u piɾəpət i ʦaŋraan i, nawħani o~u miʦaɬ~ɮaaj to~u paɬ~ɮafo~uħ no~u itiraaj i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi sħi miŋan, o~u aitini i tajwan mipaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ to~u misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan a jo~ufajo~uf sakapo~ut. nika so~uʡəɾinaj, o~uja * marəpətaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaaj ħo~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u kataɾawan a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~uja pisaʡo~usi aʦa to~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan ni sħi miŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u "tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw *** miħəʦa a ɾikisi", o~u natajraaj to~u i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miɾiso~uʡ ʦi sħi miŋan, mino~ukaj tajni tajwan i o~upipaɬ~ɮaŋ mirina ato~u pakiɾaʦ to~u sapisintin. nika o~u tiawʦaʦi a matajaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaaj ka fanaʡ to~u no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮəmak, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ko~uɾi tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u mirəpət ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋan, o~uni marəpataj tamɬ~ɮaw o~u nano~u pikiħatija mirawrawaj to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡ "ʦənʦə panɾo~uanɾo~uan sarikəʦ" ato~u "siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a ɾaɾo~umaʡaj mirawraw a raraw, o~u papatajən ko~u ka ʦiraraw, ʦaaj ko~u mamaŋaj ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ko~u miɾijaŋaj, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajwan a kasaɬ~ɮajkako~u ato~u ʦifənəkaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~umirəŋ miɬ~ɮəmak miɾijaŋ to~u matiniaj ɬ~ɮəmak, paratatəŋa ko~u ko~u tiawʦaʦi a pirəpət to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u piʦaɾap to~u kimpo~u saka pako~unira a so~uwaɾ, nano~uja, o~u sakisiʦian a piɾijaŋ marariɬ~ɮ a ʦaaj pito~uɾas, o~u sakapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ marikəʦ to~u po~unkaan a matanəŋaj mapatirəŋ to~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u siŋfa *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ saɾo~uŋao~u "*** ɬ~ɮəmak ɾəkapo~ut". saiko~uraj, maʡawiɬ~ɮ no~u sjakaj ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, o~uja marəpətaj a tamɬ~ɮaw iko~ur mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u kaʦirarawan, nano~uja, o~u ɾifajin nano~uja sa mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua minko~u siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ ato~u "ʦənʦə panɾo~uan tiawɾi". saʡajaw pirəpət no~u tiawʦaʦi ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, sakaɾamkam sa ko~u maɾasiŋsiaj ato~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u. itija * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ kaɾaħo~ukan, o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u tsiŋħo~u~ua maro~uʡ, papəɾo~u ato~u paʦipat to~u paja, patirəŋ ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj "ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ miʦo~ukəraj" itira i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mirarakat, o~u kasaʦəfaŋ no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj itira i saʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mitəɾəŋ to~u "miɾijaŋ to~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u miɾinikaj tajaɾ i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan" sanaj a sapiɾijaŋ a ʦaɾaj, ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk, tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u maɾaɾinaħ tajra i simpo~unʦə, ɾifajin, tajpisi tiaʦaʦi miɾijaŋ. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, majakjak to~u ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak. po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kasaɬ~ɮajkako~u maʦo~uwat i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj o~unto~u, ʦənsə, tajwan ħakasi jo~ufajo~uf, ʦo~uŋjaŋ kinkiwjin a kasa mikinkiwan sakapo~ut, mitəɾak "mifəɾiħ to~u ħitajan piʦaɾap to~u sifo~u a sakapo~ut" a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, maɾəkapo~ut to~u po~unkakaj tamɬ~ɮaw mapo~uɾo~uŋ miɾijaŋ. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, "po~uɾo~uŋ finawɾan mifəɾiħaj to~u pisamsam no~u siʦian a sakapo~ut" a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, nano~uja miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ tajra i ʦo~uŋʦən piħaratəŋan, ira ko~u mataəɾifaj to~u ** tamɬ~ɮaw mikiħatija. saan, mikiʡajaw miɾapɾap ko~u iməŋ to~u fanawɾan, pakaka ko~u piɾijaŋ no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj. saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miħapiw ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u to~u sapi "patərəp mitiɾiɬ~ɮ", ira ko~u ** tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u mikiħatija to~u "pako~uniraaj pinanam, awaaj ko~u raraw no~u ħaratəŋ" patərəp a o~unto~u. nano~uja, o~u ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan to~u no~u kasaɬ~ɮajkako~u miɾijaŋ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u sapipatərəpaw to~u kararawraw no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i ɬ~ɮajkako~u, miʦo~ukəraj to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan (ʦiʦaŋ) ʦi *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui miɾijas to~u kaɾa miʦo~ukəraj to~u ʦəʦaŋ, nika ʦaaj to~u katako~up ko~unini a mifəɾiħaj to~u sifo~u a fanawɾan no~u tajwan. ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u ħo~uɾiʦ kako~ujin ko~u mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj to~u sakaəʦa pitiɾiɬ~ɮ, ato~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮəmakan, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u "ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ miʦo~ukəraj" *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ato~u ħakasi ato~u "po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit ɬ~ɮajkako~u ɾəkapo~ut" a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ***, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, sjakaj kasakapo~ut, i ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk miʦaɾap to~u sijataw no~u kaso~uɾiŋ i tajpi, pasimirarakataj to~u kamatini no~u ɬ~ɮəmak to~u "paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u mirawrawaj tatiiħaj a rikəʦ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ pasaɬ~ɮakən ko~u masəmsəmaj, mifəɾiħ to~u pikariʡaŋ no~u sifo~u, miŋaɬ~ɮo~u to~u pako~uniraaj sapikiŋkiw" a * saso~uwaɾən. iko~ur i, o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, ħakasi saɾo~uŋan **** ko~u miɾafinaj itira sijataw no~u tajpi kaso~uɾiŋ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u kmt sifo~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮən ko~u ʦənʦə panɾo~uwan rikəʦ. o~u piɾijan no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i sijataw ira ko~u * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, taŋasa i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a paħərək. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾifajin makaɾaħ pasaɬ~ɮak to~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦənʦə panɾo~uwan rikəʦ a paʡəsəs. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾifajin kinato~uɾo~u miħajɬ~ɮa paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮəŋan pipataj a ʦənʦə panɾo~uwan rikəʦ. nano~uja, tiawʦaʦə pasaɬ~ɮakən ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋran, waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui, masao~u nikar (ɾin jinfo~u~u), ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ sasəpat a masaɬ~ɮak. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uja "fənəkaj mifəɾiħaj to~u sifo~u misəmsəm a nikapo~uɾo~uŋan" mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u "***" piɾijaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, pakiħaratəŋ saso~uwaɾən a mapako~unira a pato~uso~ukan, nai mafənəkaj, mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj o~unto~u ato~u sjakaj o~unto~u mapo~uɾo~uŋ paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ t o~ufinawɾan no~u tajwan "mifəɾiħ ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan ato~u siʦi pisəmsəm" a taʡaŋaj pirakarak, o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj itira kaʡajaw no~u ʦiənʦajin a miɾafin, ʦo~uŋsan nanɾo~u, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u kmt sifo~u "ħao~u b~b~vaiʦo~u~un katəfaɬ~ɮ", "paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦənʦə panɾo~uwan rikəʦ", "misiməɬ~ɮaj masakak to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan", ato~u "awaaj ko~u raraw pasaɬ~ɮakən ko~u misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a maro~ufo~uaj" sanaj. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ɾəə təŋ-ħo~u~ui miʦəriŋ to~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʦənʦə panɾo~uwan rikəʦ". taŋasa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a "satəfo~uʦ *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ" mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u, itija so~uʡəɾin no~u kmt to~u sapiɾəpataw to~u "mifəɾiħaj a kaʦiraraw" a pakajraan.
